title: Shin Chan
desc: Shin-chan is searching for a garbage van but whilst doing so, he ends up destroying the garbage bag and makes a big mess.

title: Shin Chan
desc: Hiroshi surprises Shin-chan by purchasing a carp banner for him. Later, Shin-chan borrows a can to play with his friends.

title: Shin Chan
desc: Misae has ordered a pizza but Shin-chan drops it and refrains from telling her. However, later when Misae eats it, she realises what happened.

title: Shin Chan
desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

title: Shin Chan
desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

title: Shin Chan: The Kasukabe Wild Kingdom
desc: Kasukabe's new mayor, Eco Loco, transforms all residents into animals, urging a return to primal roots. The Nohara family adjusts to new forms, like Misae's cat and Hiroshi's rooster.

title: Shin Chan
desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

title: Shin Chan
desc: When the principal pays a visit to the students of the kindergarten, Shin-chan asks him to sing a song. Later, the principal intervenes when Shin-chan kicks an empty can.

title: Shin Chan
desc: Whilst Hiroshi is working, Misae tries to stop Shin-chan from mischievously annoying him. Later, after his work is finished, Hiroshi spends time with Shin-chan.

title: Shin Chan
desc: To allow his mother to rest, Shin-chan spends his time playing with Shiro. However, Misae wakes up to find that Shin-chan is sleeping inside Shiro's kennel.

title: Shin Chan
desc: When the progressively worsening weather forces Misae and Shin-chan to remain indoors, they wait until Hiroshi returns from work and then fall asleep together.

title: Shin Chan
desc: Shin-chan visits a restaurant where Shinobu is employed and offers a handwritten note in exhange for a burger. As a result, the manager berates Shinobu.

title: Shin Chan
desc: Shin-chan visits the zoo on a school trip where he causes a nuisance and proceeds to annoy the teachers and the captive animals.
